things.name: Funafuti Conservation Area
things.description: Marine protected area with pristine coral reefs, manta rays and sea turtles

things.name: Te Ano Traditional Game
things.description: Tuvalu's unique throwing game played with pandanus balls - try the national sport

things.name: WWII Relics on the Lagoon Floor
things.description: US aircraft and equipment from the 1942 Battle of Funafuti visible in the lagoon

things.name: Tuvalu Philatelic Bureau
things.description: Tuvalu finances itself through its famous stamps - collect a piece of this tiny nation

things.name: Motuku Islet Walk
things.description: Walk to deserted islets in the lagoon with pristine sandy beaches and bird colonies

things.name: Funafuti Maneapa (Community Hall)
things.description: Watch traditional fatele dancing at the central community hall

things.name: Church of Tuvalu
things.description: Central white church with stunning stained glass depicting Pacific scenes

things.name: Pulaka Pit Agriculture
things.description: Traditional Tuvaluan cultivation of pulaka taro in composted pits below sea level

things.name: Sunrise from the Lagoon Side
things.description: Watch sunrise from the lagoon - Tuvalu may be gone within decades due to rising seas

things.name: Fresh Fish Barbecue
things.description: Fresh yellowfin tuna and bonito barbecued on the beach by local fishermen
